source_pr.title: *: Improve test for push down.
source_pr.body:
Make the test about *** push-down more readable.
PTAL @shenli @coocood @zimulala @XuHuaiYu

symptoms: sql: "select * from t order by a limit 5", (plan/plan_test.go)
failure_signature: sql: "select * from t order by a limit 5", (plan/plan_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it relied on nondeterministic result ordering (e.g., missing ORDER BY / unsorted assertions). Result ordering is not guaranteed unless explicitly enforced. This PR stabilizes it by: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: sql: "select * from t order by a limit 5", (plan/plan_test.go)

files: executor/builder.go, executor/executor_distsql.go, plan/expr_to_pb.go, plan/logical_plan_builder.go, plan/match_property.go, plan/physical_plan_builder.go, plan/physical_plans.go, plan/plan_test.go
